word: H7616 - שָׁבָב - shâbâb - shaw-bawb' - Broken in pieces

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁבב

Transliteration: shâbâb

Phonetic: shaw-bawb'

BDB Definition:

  1. splinters, fragment
    1. meaning probable

Origin: from an unused root meaning to break up

TWOT entry: 2309a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
